NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. RESPONDENT ALICE WONG and ROBERT LEHMAN'S Petition To Correct And Or Vacate Appraisal Award: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Ivan Weinberg, Esq., Weinberg, Hofman, Casey & Ropers (415) 461-9666 x101, for Petitioner and Moving To Confirm Appraisal Award

RULING:
A R G U E D; Counsel stipulate to the settlement and the Court enters an appraisal award in the amount of $75,670.22 in favor of the Respondents Alice Wong and Robert Lehman. Counsel to submit an order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
